name: footgun
description: Multi-stage, JavaScript-specific code-review chain for Claude Code.

plugins.name: footgun
plugins.description: Multi-stage, JavaScript-specific code-review chain: a tooling gate (ESLint/Prettier/tsc), five parallel read-only reviewers (correctness, async, security, performance, maintainability), and an aggregator that dedupes, reconciles severities and emits a BLOCK / APPROVE WITH NOTES verdict. Read-only; runs only when invoked.
